def find_cheapest_product(products: list[dict]) -> dict:
    sorted_products = sorted(products, key=lambda p: p["price"])
    return sorted_products[0]


def get_top_scorer(students: list[dict]) -> dict:
    sorted_students = sorted(students, key=lambda s: s["score"], reverse=True)
    return sorted_students[0]


def is_sorted_ascending(numbers: list[int]) -> bool:
    sorted_numbers = sorted(numbers)
    return sorted_numbers == numbers


def has_duplicate(items: list[str]) -> bool:
    sorted_items = sorted(items)
    for i in range(len(sorted_items) - 1):
        if sorted_items[i] == sorted_items[i + 1]:
            return True
    return False


def get_oldest_record(records: list[dict]) -> dict:
    sorted_records = sorted(records, key=lambda r: r["created_at"])
    return sorted_records[0]
